title: Commentary Update -Status changes of dependent items

posts.author: JustAnotherPM (Stuart Hooker)
posts.cookedHtml: Whilst there is an automation that updates an item’s status based on the change in status of its dependent items, this doesn’t give context as to which dependent item has changed. It would really help if there was an additional automation that could create a commentary notification indicating which dependent item has changed and the change in status.
